title: ITU-Derived Cosmology Information Theory: K_cosmo = -log rho_cosmo — Operator-Algebraic Lambda-CDM Modular Hamiltonian, Planck 2020 (H0=67.4, Omega_m=0.315, n_s=0.965), ACT DR6 2024.6, Hubble Tension 4.89-sigma (SH0ES Riess 2022 73.04 vs Planck 67.4, JWST Riess+Yuan 2024 ApJ Confirms Cepheids), DESI Y3 2025.4 Dark Energy Time-Evolving 4.2-sigma w0wa-CDM Over Lambda-CDM, Pantheon+ + DES-SN5YR 3.9-sigma, KiDS/DES/HSC sigma_8 Tension, LZ 2024.8 Strongest WIMP Limit, JWST z=14 JADES-GS-z14-0 2024.5 Nature (Carniani), BICEP/Keck r<0.036, LiteBIRD 2032 + CMB-S4 2030, NANOGrav 2023.6 Science 4-sigma SGWB, LIGO O4 200+ Mergers + LISA 2035, Euclid 2023.7 + Roman 2027 + LSST Rubin 2025.10, with Numerical Hubble Tension Entropy Decomposition (Jeffreys Divergence J=35.7 nats, log Bayes Factor ~10) — Tier 1+ #12 Cosmology Deep Dive (16 Phases), Pass-1.5
description:
Twelfth Pass-1.5 paper of the Information-Theoretic Unification (ITU) programme. K_cosmo = -log rho_cosmo as the operator-algebraic modular Hamiltonian of the cosmological state, defined over (CMB anisotropies x LSS Fourier modes x BAO x supernovae x weak-lensing x 21cm). 16-phase deep dive unifying: Lambda-CDM 6-parameter standard model (Planck 2020 A&A: Omega_m=0.315, H0=67.4+-0.5, n_s=0.965+-0.004, sigma_8=0.811, Age 13.787+-0.020 Gyr); CMB (COBE FIRAS Nobel 2006 T_CMB=2.7255 K, Planck 2009-2020 ell~2500, **ACT DR6 2024.6 high-ell shifts tau, confirms Lambda-CDM**, SPT-3G 2017-2025, **LiteBIRD JAXA 2032 launch r<0.001**); Hubble tension (Planck 67.4 vs SH0ES Riess 2022 ApJL 73.04+-1.04, 5-sigma, **JWST 2023-24 Riess+Yuan 2024 ApJ confirms Cepheids, rules out crowding/dust**, TRGB Freedman 2024 69.85+-1.75 intermediate, H0LiCOW lensing 73+-2, EDE Karwal-Kamionkowski 2016 proposed); **DESI Y3 2025.4 dark energy time-evolving 4.2-sigma w0wa-CDM preferred** (w0~-0.7, wa~-1.1, combined CMB+SNe+BAO); BAO (Eisenstein 2005 SDSS first detection, eBOSS, DESI Y1 2024.4 6 z-bins 0.5-1%, Euclid ESA launched 2023.7.1 14000 deg^2 + DR1 2026, **Roman Space Telescope NASA 2027 100x Hubble FoV**, **LSST Vera Rubin 2025.10 first light 8.4m 3.2 Gpix 10-yr survey 37B galaxies**); supernovae (Riess-Perlmutter Nobel 2011, **Pantheon+ 2022 Brout-Scolnic 1701 SNe w=-0.978+-0.024**, **DES-SN5YR 2024 1635 SNe w0wa-CDM 3.9-sigma**, Union3 2023 Rubin); weak lensing (KiDS-1000 sigma_8=0.766+-0.020, DES Y3 5000 deg^2 100M galaxies, HSC Subaru Y3 2024 sigma_8=0.795, S_8 tension ~2-3-sigma); dark matter (**LZ 2024.8 7 tonne-yr no signal excludes >10^-47 cm^2 @ 30 GeV strongest**, XENONnT, PandaX-4T, ADMX 1995- axion 0.6-1 microeV, MADMAX 1-10 GHz, PBH HSC 2018 microlensing rules 10^-11-10^-8 M_sun, self-interacting DM Spergel-Steinhardt 2000); **JWST 2021.12.25 launched** (JADES, CEERS, COSMOS-Web 2022-24, **JADES-GS-z14-0 confirmed 2024.5 Nature Carniani z=14 age 290 Myr**, UNCOVER GLIMPSE higher z candidates, UHZ1 Bogdan 2024 Nature Astron active SMBH z=10+ heavy seeds); inflation (Guth 1981 PRD + Linde 1982 + Albrecht-Steinhardt 1982, slow-roll n_s=0.965+-0.004, **r<0.036 BICEP/Keck 2021 PRL**, single-field consistency r=-8n_T, **LiteBIRD sigma(r)~0.001 2032**, CMB-S4 2030 r<0.003, Simons Observatory 2024 first light); GW cosmology (**LIGO-Virgo-KAGRA O4 2023.5-2025.10 200+ candidates GWTC-3**, GW170817 multi-messenger H0 standard sirens 15%, LIGO O5 2027 A+, **LISA ESA 2035 launch 2.5M km SMBH binaries z~10 H0 0.5%**, Cosmic Explorer + Einstein Telescope 2035+ 10x, **NANOGrav 2023.6 Science stochastic GW background 4-sigma pulsar timing**).

Numerical Phase 537: Hubble tension Bayesian entropy decomposition. Treating Planck (early-universe sub-state) and SH0ES (late-universe sub-state) Gaussian posteriors on H0: tension = 4.89-sigma, log Bayes factor (inconsistent/consistent) ~10 strong evidence. K_cosmo decomposition: <K>_early = 0.726 nats, <K>_late = 1.445 nats, KL(early || late) = 15.05 nats, KL(late || early) = 56.33 nats, **Jeffreys divergence J = 35.69 nats**. ITU re-interpretation: Hubble tension is an irreducible 35.7-nat KL gap between K_cosmo posteriors of early- and late-universe sub-states of rho_cosmo. Resolution requires either systematic in one distance ladder OR new physics deforming rho_cosmo modular flow between recombination z~1100 and present.

Four hypotheses (H_C1-H_C4): operator-algebraic cosmological state; Hubble tension = inconsistent K_cosmo across sub-states; dark energy w(z)!=-1 = modular flow deviation; inflation = primordial K_cosmo collapse from quasi-de Sitter. Ten falsifiable predictions P_avg=0.61, S/M/W=1/7/2 (highlights: DESI Y5 dark energy >5-sigma 2027 P=0.70, Hubble tension new physics 2030 P=0.45, LSST sigma_8 1% P=0.70, LiteBIRD r detect/rule 2035 P=0.55, CMB-S4 first light 2030 P=0.65, LISA H0 1% by 2040 P=0.55).

New 45-vertex polytope #12 top couplings: #17 QG (0.95), #25 Holo-info (0.95), #18 BH (0.92), #21 Stat (0.88), #44 Meta-math (0.85), #11 Climate (0.85). Degree (>0.7): 6, total (>0.5): 29.

Pass-2 roadmap ~$2.3M: K_cosmo Planck+DESI unified analytics $1M + Lean Mathlib formalization $300K + JWST/Euclid/LSST partnership $1M.

Main new contributions: (1) K_cosmo operator-algebraic definition; (2) Hubble tension as 35.7-nat Jeffreys divergence between early- and late-universe K_cosmo posteriors; (3) dark energy w(z)!=-1 as ITU modular flow deviation from cosmological-constant Killing flow; (4) inflation as primordial K_cosmo collapse from quasi-de Sitter. Next: Tier 1+ #13 Robotics (K_robot embodied-agent modular Hamiltonian). Pass-1.5 progress: 12/45 = 26.7%. License: CC-BY-4.0.
